pageContext.name: Robin Hood and Maid Marian
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Robin Hood and Maid Marian Figurine!  Robin Hood & Maid Marian share an embrace in this highly detailed, hand-painted figurine from the Disney Showcase Collection. Extra detailing in their costumes and the use of faux gems and metallic paint make this piece a must for any Disney collector.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Disney collection today!
